title: CV7 9PU, Staircraft Group Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/EP3129LA/A001
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Staircraft Group Limited Installation name: Unit 2 Stentor Way Permit number: EPR/EP3129LA  "
